_doc: Cinder Creatures starter selection — 3 creatures from data/creatures.json picked for type triangle (CORE/LOGIC/DATA). Used by CORE LAB scene starter-pick event.

starters.name: KERNITE
starters.professor_pitch: KERNITE is the bedrock. Slow to wake but harder than diamond once it's in memory.

starters.name: RECURSE
starters.color_lore: calls itself — high damage, fragile, can stack
starters.professor_pitch: RECURSE hits twice as hard as it weighs, but a hard hit folds it. Don't let it stack too deep.

starters.name: BYTEFLY
starters.color_lore: swarms in tall grass — fast, weak per unit, deadly in numbers
starters.professor_pitch: BYTEFLY is small, fast, and travels in flocks. Trade-off: any solid hit ends a single one.
